---
title: "04 Discharage"
author: "Alex Koiter"
---





## Load libraries





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
})
```
:::





## Load data




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
discharge <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/discharge.csv")) |>
  mutate(volume_m3 = q * 60*15/1000) |>
  mutate(q_m3s = q / 1000) |>
  group_by(watershed) |>
  filter(date_time >= ymd_hms("2023-04-11 06:00:00", tz = "UTC"), date_time < ymd_hms("2023-04-15 00:00:00", tz = "UTC")) |>
  ungroup()
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Rows: 9216 Columns: 3
── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Delimiter: ","
chr  (1): watershed
dbl  (1): q
dttm (1): date_time

ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
```


:::
:::







## Plastic counts




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
sampling <- tibble(
  start = ymd_hms(c(
    "2023-04-13 10:00:00",
    "2023-04-13 10:00:00",
    "2023-04-13 12:00:00",
    "2023-04-13 12:00:00",
    "2023-04-14 10:00:00",
    "2023-04-14 10:00:00",
    "2023-04-14 12:00:00",
    "2023-04-14 12:00:00"
  )),
  end = ymd_hms(c(
    "2023-04-13 11:45:00",
    "2023-04-13 11:30:00",
    "2023-04-13 13:30:00",
    "2023-04-13 12:45:00",
    "2023-04-14 11:45:00",
    "2023-04-14 11:45:00",
    "2023-04-14 13:45:00",
    "2023-04-14 13:45:00"
  )),
  watershed = c("East", "West", "East", "West", "East", "West", "East", "West"),
  count = c(3, 3, 2, 3, 1, 0, 1, 2),
  period = c(1, 1, 2, 2, 3, 3, 4, 4)
)

results <- discharge |>
  inner_join(
    sampling,
    join_by(watershed, date_time >= start, date_time <= end)
  ) |>
summarise(volume = sum(volume_m3), 
          count = max(count),
          .by = c(watershed, period)) |>
  summarise(volume = sum(volume), 
          count = sum(count),
          .by = c(watershed)) |>
  mutate(conc =  count/volume)
```
:::






## PC estimation





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
discharge |>
  summarise(total_Q = sum(volume_m3), .by = watershed) |>
  full_join(results) |>
  mutate(total = conc * total_Q)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Joining with `by = join_by(watershed)`
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 2 × 6
  watershed total_Q volume count   conc total
  <chr>       <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>
1 West        2424.   113.     8 0.0706  171.
2 East        4675.   259.     7 0.0270  126.
```


:::
:::





## plot discharge




::: {#cell-fig-discharge .cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
#| label: fig-discharge
#| fig-cap: "Discharge for the East and West watersheds during the spring snowmelt period in April 2023. Shaded regions indicate the four sampling periods for polymer coatings."

ggplot(data = discharge, aes(x = date_time, y = q_m3s)) +
  geom_rect(data = sampling,
            aes(xmin = start, xmax = end + minutes(15), ymin = -Inf,ymax = Inf,
            fill = factor(period)), alpha = 0.2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_x_datetime(date_breaks = "6 hours", date_labels = "%b %d %H:%M", expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.001,0)) +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~watershed) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = expression(Discharge~(m^3~s^-1)),
       fill = "Sampling period")  +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![Discharge for the East and West watersheds during the spring snowmelt period in April 2023. Shaded regions indicate the four sampling periods for polymer coatings.](04_Discharge_files/figure-jats/fig-discharge-1.png){#fig-discharge}
:::
:::
